interpretation.safe_claim: PROTEAS contains nested patient archives with RTDOSE DICOM objects, RT plan/structure/image context, planning CT, MRI, NIfTI RTP images, and tumour masks.
interpretation.unsafe_claim_until_next_step: Do not claim dose-volume clinical validation until structure-to-dose and prescription/fractionation parsing are completed.
interpretation.next_experiment: Extract RD/RP/RS plus tumour masks for dose-grid registration, target coverage, BED/EQD2 sensitivity, and fractionation-stratified robustness.
